scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run fix-permissions && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run build && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r artifacts/uk-education-guide/dist/public/* dist/
scripts.postinstall: pnpm run fix-permissions && chmod -R +x node_modules/.bin 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
